2605.18211.title: Leveraging Graph Structure in Seq2Seq Models for Knowledge Graph Link Prediction
2605.18211.paper_summary: We introduce Graph-Augmented Sequence-to-Sequence (GA-S2S), a novel framework that integrates a T5-small encoder-decoder with a Relational Graph Attention Network (RGAT) to improve link prediction in knowledge graphs. While existing Seq2Seq models rely solely on surface-level textual descriptions of entities and relations and at best, flatten the neighborhoods of a query entity into a single linear sequence, thereby discarding the inherent graph structure, GA-S2S jointly encodes both textual features and the full $k$-hop subgraph topology surrounding the query entity. By integrating raw encoder outputs with RGAT's relation-aware embeddings, our model captures and leverages richer multi-hop relational patterns and textual information. Our preliminary experiments on the CoDEx dataset demonstrate that GA-S2S outperforms competitive Seq2Seq-based baseline models, achieving up to a 19\% relative gain in link prediction accuracy.
2605.18211.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹了圖增強序列到序列（GA-S2S），這是一個新穎的框架，將T5-small編碼器-解碼器與關係圖注意力網絡（RGAT）結合，以改善知識圖譜中的連結預測。雖然現有的Seq2Seq模型僅依賴於實體和關係的表面文本描述，並且在最佳情況下將查詢實體的鄰域壓縮為單一線性序列，從而丟棄了固有的圖結構，但GA-S2S則共同編碼文本特徵和圍繞查詢實體的完整$k$-跳子圖拓撲。通過將原始編碼器輸出與RGAT的關係感知嵌入相結合，我們的模型捕捉並利用了更豐富的多跳關係模式和文本信息。我們在CoDEx數據集上的初步實驗表明，GA-S2S超越了競爭性的基於Seq2Seq的基準模型，在連結預測準確性上實現了高達19\%的相對增益。
2605.18211.author: Luu Huu Phuc et.al.
2605.18211.authors: Luu Huu Phuc, Ratan Bahadur Thapa, Mojtaba Nayyeri, Jingcheng Wu, Evgeny Kharlamov, Steffen Staab
